description_long: This is a classic, high-backed armchair upholstered in deep brown, tufted leather with a luxurious, textured finish. The chair features prominent winged sides and a tall, rounded backrest, both adorned with button-tufted detailing that extends to the seat and inner armrests. The armrests are thick, padded, and curve outward, bordered by a line of decorative brass nailhead trim. The seat is generously cushioned, providing ample comfort, and the front legs are elegantly carved in a cabriole style, while the rear legs are straight and sturdy. The back of the chair is smooth and unadorned, with the same rich leather finish and nailhead trim along the top edge. This armchair exudes a sense of sophistication and would be well-suited for upscale urban interiors, such as lobbies, offices, or lounges.
description: A luxurious, high-backed brown leather armchair with tufted upholstery, winged sides, and decorative nailhead trim. Features padded armrests and carved wooden legs for a classic, elegant look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, padded armrest, winged backrest, and cabriole front leg.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the button-tufted seat, backrest, and both padded armrests with nailhead trim.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and leg details, with visible texture and trim.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the smooth leather back and nailhead trim along the top edge.
attribute_armrest_design: padded and upholstered, outwardly curved, with brass nailhead trim
attribute_backrest_style: high and winged, button-tufted, rounded top
attribute_leg_type: carved wooden cabriole front legs, straight wooden rear legs
attribute_upholstery_pattern: tufted leather with diamond button pattern
